form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr3) over 2240m after showing early pace at Goulburn was leading by 2.3 at the bell, beaten 8 m by Lit The Wick (2:49.50) in NR up to 52 on March 30 at $13. Before that, a game effort when 2nd (Sr1) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway, beaten 13 m by Wicked Wizard (2:03.60) in NR up to 48 on February 27 at $9.50. Sure to go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifting ground passing the 300m which inconvenienced Feelgood Ray.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr3) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway beaten 15 m by Franco Nickelback (2:03.70) in NR up to 55 on April 4 at $26. Before that, 4th (Fr2) over 1740m after showing early speed at Riverina Paceway was 2nd-3.1 at the bell, beaten 5 m by Kristysgirl (2:05.30) in NR up to 47 on March 27 at $1.22. Well drawn and can go close.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr2) over 1635m at Temora was 6th-10.4 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Modern Sheen (2:) in NR up to 47 M on April 6 at $4. Before that, a game effort when 2nd (Fr4) over 1710m after showing early pace at Goulburn was leading by 1.7 at the bell, beaten 3 m by Majors Creek (2:04.80) in NR up to 50 M on March 30 at $6. Can do much better this time.

form.formComment: Last start by a head when driven back in the field, (Fr6) held up early, at Goulburn (2:04.00) beating Bam Bam Brook in NR up to 47 on March 30 at $4.20 at the bell was 3rd-6.2. Winning claims again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running rounding the home turn.
Yielded ground inside the final 600m to finish in 8th position beaten 77.9m.
Inconvenienced passing the 1400m when Mister Boombastik broke gait.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr2) over 2000m at Temora was 6th-10.2 at the bell, beaten 12 m by Millwood Grace (2:30.20) in NR up to 53 on April 6 at $34. At the run before 5th (Fr6) over 2270m after showing early pace at Riverina Paceway, at the bell was 5th-8.5 beaten 6 m by Roll To The Top (2:45.60) in NR up to 48 on March 20 at $4.40. Prefer others.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr4) over 2000m at Temora, at the bell was 4th-6.2 beaten 15 m by Millwood Grace (2:30.20) in NR up to 53 on April 6 at $4.40. At the run before good run when 2nd (Fr1) over 2240m at Goulburn was 3rd-5.1 at the bell, beaten 3.5 m by Lit The Wick (2:49.50) in NR up to 52 on March 30 at $4.60. Likely to improve on the latest effort.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Sr3) over 1770m at this track, at the bell was 9th-20.8 beaten 13 m by Emerging Deal (2:09.20) in NR up to 53 on March 15 at $5. Before that, a solid effort when 2nd (Sr3) over 1770m at this track, beaten 9 m by Highlands Warrior (2:10.80) in NR up to 53 on March 9 at $7.50. Can play a role in the finish.
